title: Lehman Brothers Files for Bankruptcy
summary: In the largest bankruptcy filing in U.S. history, Lehman Brothers collapsed today, sending shockwaves through global financial markets and triggering massive sell-offs.

title: AIG Faces Collapse, Markets Plunge Further
summary: Fears of systemic failure grow as AIG teeters on the bring of collapse. Investors are dumping equities indiscriminately across all sectors, rushing to cash and gold.

title: Dow Plunges 777 Points After Bailout Fails
summary: The stock market experienced its largest single-day point drop ever after the House rejected the $700 billion financial rescue plan. Consumer confidence is completely shattered.

title: Recession Fears Worsen, Tech and Consumer Stocks Hit Hard
summary: Even resilient companies like Apple (AAPL) and Coca-Cola (KO) are not spared. Analysts warn of a deep, prolonged recession destroying consumer spending power for years.
